name: ivanlao-whatsapp-broadcaster
description: Suite Ivan Lao Marketing Automation per gestire account WhatsApp Business (WABA) e inviare campagne massive di template WhatsApp da un file Excel tramite WhatsApp Business Cloud API. v1.4.0: onboarding ambiente Claude Cowork (check sandbox + allowlist proxy) e fallback Make/n8n/Apps Script/locale/Postman.
